title: N.Y. Comp. Codes R. & Regs. Tit. 1 § 1.1 - Definitions
text:
As used herein, the following terms shall have the
following meanings:

(a) Commissioner
means the Commissioner of Agriculture and Markets of the State of New
York.

(b) Person means individual,
partnership, corporation or cooperative association.

(c) Vitamin D Milk means milk in which the
vitamin D content has been increased in the manner set forth in section
1.4 of this Part.

(d) Approved laboratory means a laboratory
approved by the commissioner pursuant to section
1.2 of this Part.

Notes
